data.body: S6 (b825) DONE (docs): ADR-0042 authored (design record: contract+enum, R5 invariant, 8 prior-art-grounded decisions, security invariants incl. access-diff-vs-baseline, separation-of-concerns, SPOF tradeoff, deferrals+triggers) + CLAUDE.md/CONTRIBUTING.md §2e landing rewrite + your-first-change.md sweep. Pushed #591. Full non-deploy stack: #588(S2c-fix)->#589(S3)->#590(S4)->#591(S6). NEXT: S5 (4 deploy tasks) — authorable repo artifacts (Dockerfile/compose/terraform/scripts/status-endpoint/crash-recovery) can be built+landed; the actual container deploy + SSM Terraform apply + live E2E need AWS auth (ESCALATE per user) + live prod Gerrit host.
